description: Use this API to specify the progress output device. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = progress_output(islct, filarg, options)

parameters.name: filarg
parameters.description: Printer name or filename; ignored if islct is not 2 or 3. (input).

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying open and printing options; ignored if ISLCT is not 2 or 3. (input).

islct.description: standard destination. In the PSSE GUI standard output for progress is the Progress tab of the output bar.

options.description: file and printer open options: The OPTIONS(1) values may be summed to select multiple options (0 by default).
open with carriage control format and, for files, for overwrite of existing files with buffering.
open file for append (file output only).
set printer orientation to portrait mode (printer output only).
open file with no buffering (file output only).
open printer in immediate print mode (printer output only).
number of copies to print (printer only) (0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
